motion: Should PR #28: epic: Frontend Scaffold & Integration be merged into main?

findings.description: selectTable race condition — concurrent table clicks can corrupt UI state
findings.fix_applied: Monotonic request counter (selectRequestId) guards all state writes in selectTable and goToPage. Commit 5933501.

findings.description: CSV error row is invalid CSV — '# ERROR:' line corrupts downstream parsers
findings.fix_applied: Error comment row removed. tracing::warn logs the event. Commit 5933501.

findings.description: csv::Writer instantiated per row in export loop — 500K Writer allocations
findings.fix_applied: Single csv::Writer hoisted outside loop, flush at batch boundaries. Commit 5933501.

findings.description: CSV export silently delivers truncated files on mid-stream DB error — HTTP 200 committed before spawn, no client-visible truncation signal
findings.fix_description: Send Err(...) to tx on stream_error instead of silently dropping the sender. Client can detect stream error.

findings.description: goToPage sets currentPage before fetch resolves — on failure, StatusBar shows wrong page number while grid shows stale data
findings.fix_description: Move currentPage = page to after queryResult = result inside the try block.

findings.description: Content-Disposition filename not sanitized — display name with quotes or CRLF produces malformed header
findings.fix_description: Strip double-quote, semicolon, CR, LF from filename before header interpolation.

follow_up_issues: CSV export silent truncation on mid-stream error (finding 4)
goToPage optimistic currentPage not rolled back on error (finding 5)
